name: 2009 Iranian Presidential Election
description: The June 2009 presidential election was one of the most consequential and disputed in the Islamic Republic's history. Incumbent [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) was declared the winner with 63% of the vote over reformist challenger [Mir-Hossein Mousavi](/people/mir-hossein-mousavi) and [Mehdi Karroubi](/people/mehdi-karroubi). The opposition alleged massive fraud, and the disputed results triggered the [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009) — the largest protests Iran had seen since the 1979 revolution. The [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) certified the results after a partial recount.
